name: CurvedDimensionSetHandler
summary: The CurvedDimensionSetHandler class contains operations for creating curved dimension sets.

constructors.name: CurvedDimensionSetHandler
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the CurvedDimensionSetHandler class

methods.name: CreateCurvedDimensionSetOrthogonal(ViewBase, Point, Point, Point, PointList, Double)
methods.summary: Creates a curved dimension set with orthogonal reference lines from the specified points and inserts it to the database.

methods.name: CreateCurvedDimensionSetOrthogonal(ViewBase, Point, Point, Point, PointList, Double, CurvedDimensionSetOrthogonal.CurvedDimensionSetOrthogonalAttributes)
methods.summary: Creates a curved dimension set with orthogonal reference lines from the specified points and inserts it to the database.

methods.name: CreateCurvedDimensionSetRadial(ViewBase, Point, Point, Point, PointList, Double)
methods.signature: CreateCurvedDimensionSetRadial(ViewBase, Point, Point, Point, PointList, Double)(...)
methods.summary: Creates a curved dimension set from the specified points and inserts it to the database. Uses the default attributes.

methods.name: CreateCurvedDimensionSetRadial(ViewBase, Point, Point, Point, PointList, Double, CurvedDimensionSetRadial.CurvedDimensionSetRadialAttributes)
methods.signature: CreateCurvedDimensionSetRadial(ViewBase, Point, Point, Point, PointList, Double, CurvedDimensionSetRadial.CurvedDimensionSetRadialAttributes)(...)
methods.summary: Creates a curved dimension set from the specified points and inserts it to the database.
